scripts.dev: concurrently -n s,c "nodemon --watch src --watch server.ts -e ts,pug,css --exec 'bun run server.ts'" "tailwindcss -i ./src/input.css -o ./public/main.css --watch"
scripts.dev:debug: concurrently -n s,c "nodemon --watch src --watch server.ts -e ts,pug,css --exec 'bun --inspect=3344 run server.ts'" "tailwindcss -i ./src/input.css -o ./public/main.css --watch"
